x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: IP range coverage determines which infrastructure discovery can find. Gaps in coverage create blind spots in the CMDB that Now Assist cannot reason about.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define IP ranges for all known infrastructure segments via discovery_range_list.do. Cross-reference against network topology documentation to identify gaps. IP range gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist cannot reason about during incident response.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c49
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[IP range coverage determines which infrastructure discovery can find. Gaps in coverage create blind spots in the CMDB that Now Assist cannot reason about.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Discovery Coverage by IP Range</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('discovery_range');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var ranges = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = ranges + ' IP ranges defined for discovery';

    if (ranges >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: ranges + ' IP ranges configured. Discovery has broad infrastructure coverage for Now Assist ITOM context building.'
        };
    } else if (ranges >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + ranges + ' IP range(s) defined (target: 3+). Discovery coverage gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist ITOM cannot reason about during incident response.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No IP ranges defined for discovery. Now Assist ITOM has no infrastructure scope to discover — CMDB will lack the CI data required for AI impact analysis.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005981</number>
<order>20</order>
<remediation_guidance>Define IP ranges for all known infrastructure segments via discovery_range_list.do. Cross-reference against network topology documentation to identify gaps. IP range gaps create CMDB blind spots that Now Assist cannot reason about during incident response.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c49</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
